scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.context:budget:report: sh -c 'if [ -f scripts/context/context-budget-report.mjs ]; then node scripts/context/context-budget-report.mjs "$@"; else echo "Skipping context:budget:report (scripts/context/context-budget-report.mjs not found)"; fi' sh
scripts.context:budget:report:pretty: sh -c 'if [ -f scripts/context/context-budget-report.mjs ]; then node scripts/context/context-budget-report.mjs --pretty "$@"; else echo "Skipping context:budget:report:pretty (scripts/context/context-budget-report.mjs not found)"; fi' sh
scripts.context:budget:report:compact: sh -c 'if [ -f scripts/context/context-budget-report.mjs ]; then node scripts/context/context-budget-report.mjs --compact "$@"; else echo "Skipping context:budget:report:compact (scripts/context/context-budget-report.mjs not found)"; fi' sh
scripts.context:shards:check: sh -c 'if [ -f scripts/context/validate-shard-links.mjs ]; then node scripts/context/validate-shard-links.mjs "$@"; else echo "Skipping context:shards:check (scripts/context/validate-shard-links.mjs not found)"; fi' sh
scripts.context:shards:check:strict: sh -c 'if [ -f scripts/context/validate-shard-links.mjs ]; then node scripts/context/validate-shard-links.mjs --strict "$@"; else echo "Skipping context:shards:check:strict (scripts/context/validate-shard-links.mjs not found)"; fi' sh
scripts.context:shards:check:warn: sh -c 'if [ -f scripts/context/validate-shard-links.mjs ]; then node scripts/context/validate-shard-links.mjs --warn "$@"; else echo "Skipping context:shards:check:warn (scripts/context/validate-shard-links.mjs not found)"; fi' sh
scripts.context:all: npm run context:budget && npm run context:budget:report && npm run context:shards:check && npm run context:untracked:check
scripts.context:untracked:check: sh -c 'if [ -f scripts/context/detect-large-untracked.mjs ]; then node scripts/context/detect-large-untracked.mjs "$@"; else echo "Skipping context:untracked:check (scripts/context/detect-large-untracked.mjs not found)"; fi' sh
scripts.test: npm run test:api && npm run test:ui
scripts.test:coordination: npm run coordination:check && npm run context:budget
scripts.security:backend: NODE_ENV=test npm run test --prefix backend -- test/security-headers.test.js test/auth-boundary.test.js test/auth-rate-limiting.test.js
scripts.precommit: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run format:check && npm run test:ui:mock && npm run test:api
scripts.test:standardized: npm run test:coordination && npm run test:api && npm run test:ui:mock && npm run test:ui:live
scripts.review:full: echo 'Start a full review session — see docs/reviews/review-protocol.md and docs/reviews/reviewer-charter.md'
